productDisplayName: FILA Men Dls Circuit 2 Black Sports Shoes
description: Reinforcing the brand's style, passion and creativity that are deeply embedded in its genetic code, the fila DLS Circuit 2 shoe is a great buy for those who love to play on indoor courts.UpperMesh upper upper for lightweight comfort and absolute breathabilitySynthetic and leather overlays strategically placed for added shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded and meshed tongue and collar for snug, all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and absolute shock absorptionFabric footbed for sweat-free wearOutsoleTPR outsole with criss-crossing miniature waffle pattern lugs and textured in-between for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
